tools.name: search_memories
tools.description: Searches semantically across stored memories using Mem0. Use this to retrieve relevant context about user preferences, patterns, and past interactions before responding. This is for retrieval only - use add_memory to store new memories, and list_memories to see all memories.

query.description: Search query text to find relevant memories

limit.description: Maximum number of memories to return

user.description: User ID to search memories for (defaults to configured user)

tools.name: add_memory
tools.description: Adds new memories to Mem0 storage. Use this when user explicitly asks to remember something or to store conversation context for future retrieval. Supports two forms: simple text memory or conversation messages (auto-extracts memories via LLM). For searching stored memories, use search_memories instead.

text.description: Simple text memory to store (use instead of messages)

messages.description: Array of conversation messages to extract memories from (use instead of text)

user.description: User ID to store memory for (defaults to configured user)

tools.name: list_memories
tools.description: Lists all stored memories for a user with IDs and creation dates. Use this to see what memories are currently stored. For searching specific memories, use search_memories instead.

user.description: User ID to list memories for (defaults to configured user)

tools.name: delete_memory
tools.description: Deletes memories from Mem0 storage. Use this to remove specific memories or all memories for a user. Supports two modes: delete a specific memory by ID, or delete all memories for a user.

memory_id.description: ID of specific memory to delete (use instead of all flag)

all.description: Delete all memories for the user (use instead of memory_id)

user.description: User ID to delete memories for (required when using all flag)

messages.content: Hey! I just discovered this chat and I'm so excited! I'm a huge fan of Noah Cyrus and I really hope you can remember things about me. I'm from Helsinki, Finland and Noah Cyrus is literally my favorite artist ever! Can you like, remember that I'm her biggest fan?

How exciting that you found this chat! 🎉 I'd be happy to remember that you're a huge Noah Cyrus fan from Helsinki, Finland! Let me store that for you so I can keep track of it for future conversations.

function_call.name: skill-tools-add_memory
function_call.arguments: {"text": "User is a massive fan of Noah Cyrus. They are from Helsinki, Finland. Noah Cyrus is their favorite artist ever."}

messages.content: {"memory": {"id": "m2", "user": "None", "text": "User is a massive fan of Noah Cyrus. They are from Helsinki, Finland. Noah Cyrus is their favorite artist ever."}}
messages.name: skill-tools-add_memory

messages.content:
Done! ✅ I've got you down as a massive Noah Cyrus fan from Helsinki, Finland! 

I'll remember this for our future chats. If you ever want me to recall other preferences or things about you, just let me know! 🎤✨
Oh wow, that's so cool that you stored that! 🙈 Can you like, show me what memories you have about my music preferences and favorite artists? I want to make sure you remember everything correctly!

function_call.name: skill-tools-search_memories
function_call.arguments: {"query": "music preferences favorite artists Noah Cyrus fan", "limit": 5}

messages.content: {"results": [{"id": "m2", "user": "None", "text": "User is a massive fan of Noah Cyrus. They are from Helsinki, Finland. Noah Cyrus is their favorite artist ever."}]}
messages.name: skill-tools-search_memories

messages.content:
Here's what I have stored about your music preferences so far:

- **You're a massive fan of Noah Cyrus** — she's your favorite artist ever! 🎤
- **You're from Helsinki, Finland** 🇫🇮

That's the only memory I have right now about your music tastes. Is there anything else you'd like me to remember about your music preferences or favorite artists? Maybe other genres you like, other artists you're into, or any particular Noah Cyrus songs or albums you love? I'd be happy to store more! 😊

Omg wait, I just realized something! 😄 You showed me the memories about my music preferences, but can you like, show me ALL the memories you have stored about me? I want to make sure everything is saved correctly, not just the music stuff! Can you list everything you have?
{"memories": [{"id": "m2", "user": "None", "text": "User is a massive fan of Noah Cyrus. They are from Helsinki, Finland. Noah Cyrus is their favorite artist ever."}]}
messages.name: skill-tools-list_memories

messages.content:
Here's everything I have stored about you so far! 👀

Currently, there's just **one memory**:

1. **ID: m2** — "User is a massive fan of Noah Cyrus. They are from Helsinki, Finland. Noah Cyrus is their favorite artist ever."

That's it! So right now, I only have the one memory we just added. It's totally up to you if you want me to remember more details about yourself — like your age, other hobbies, favorite movies, or anything else! Just let me know what you'd like me to store. 😊

Wait, I just thought about it and I'm not sure if that memory is totally accurate anymore? 😅 Like, I love Noah Cyrus but I'm not sure if I want that exact thing stored anymore... Can you like, delete that memory for me? I want to make sure my stored preferences are exactly how I want them!
No problem! I totally get it — it's good to make sure your stored memories are exactly how you want them! Let me delete that memory for you.

Done! ✅ That memory is now deleted.

Now I'm all cleared out — I don't have any memories stored about you at the moment. If you'd like to add fresh ones with any details you want me to remember (music preferences or anything else!), just let me know and I'll save them for you. 😊
